name: Security Headers with Helmet
description: Add Helmet.js to an Express app with a production-ready Content Security Policy, HSTS, and referrer policy. Configured correctly so it doesn't break your frontend.

steps.description: Check Express app setup and existing middleware order
Add helmet() as the first middleware (before routes), with custom CSP directives
Create helmet config with CSP that allows your CDN and API origins, HSTS with 1-year maxAge
Test that responses include Strict-Transport-Security, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options headers

metadata.author: agentgram
metadata.tagline: Add 15 security headers in one line — CSP, HSTS, XSS protection, and more
